economic_notes: Band owns multiple commercial enterprises including McGraw Seafood, MicMac Industries, River of Fire Market, Elsipogtog Pharmacy, 711394 NB Inc., McGraw Peat Moss, McGraw Aquaculture, Mlsegnatigeoei Inc., and Big Cove Wellness Committee Inc. Commercial fisheries is a major revenue source at $18.47M.
notes: McGraw Seafood (2008) Inc. recorded a significant equity loss of $3,515,912. 711394 NB Inc. recorded an equity loss of $1,790,324. Big Cove Wellness Committee Inc. is fully consolidated (not a GBE). The remaining 8 commercial enterprises are accounted for on modified equity basis. Restricted cash includes CMHC reserve funds ($1,830,068) and debt reserve fund ($344,986) and trust funds held by federal government ($473,678). Investments held in trust of $6,836,065 were fully liquidated during 2023 (were $6,836,065 in 2022). Contributions receivable increased significantly to $22,639,810 from $8,685,090. Remuneration schedules referenced at pages 102-103 but not included in provided images.
